item.title: Jaime French on a show that didn’t age well
item.description: Jaime French shares a light take on a show that has not aged well over time.

media:content.media:title: Jaime French on a show that didn’t age well
media:content.media:description: Jaime French shares a light take on a show that has not aged well over time.

item.title: Revisiting Jessica Alba’s Dance Film Honey
item.description: I take a lighthearted look back at Honey and its place in early 2000s dance movies. A nostalgic review with a playful twist.

media:content.media:title: Revisiting Jessica Alba’s Dance Film Honey
media:content.media:description: I take a lighthearted look back at Honey and its place in early 2000s dance movies. A nostalgic review with a playful twist.

item.title: I Finally Watched Raise Your Voice
item.description: A first-time watch of Raise Your Voice that didn’t go quite how I expected.

media:content.media:title: I Finally Watched Raise Your Voice
media:content.media:description: A first-time watch of Raise Your Voice that didn’t go quite how I expected.

item.title: Both sides of copycat culture are exhausting
item.description: Diving into the debate around copycat culture, breaking down why both the copycats and the critics can be equally frustrating. A funny, sharp take on trends, originality, and internet drama.

media:content.media:title: Both sides of copycat culture are exhausting
media:content.media:description: Diving into the debate around copycat culture, breaking down why both the copycats and the critics can be equally frustrating. A funny, sharp take on trends, originality, and internet drama.

item.title: Tyra Banks is the Worst
item.description: How was America's Next Top Model even allowed to air??

media:content.media:title: Tyra Banks is the Worst
media:content.media:description: How was America's Next Top Model even allowed to air??
